metadata.funder: BreastSCan is co-funded under the EU4Health Programme 2021-2027 under grant agreement no. 101219312. Funded by the European Union.
metadata.description: Study of breast cancer diagnosed during routine mammogram screenings including interval cancer.
metadata.notes:
Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or European Health and Digital Executive Agency. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them. 
0.0.2 Minor typos in some variable names have been corrected. Catalogs have been added and minor errors in the 'transformations_from_origin' column have been corrected.
0.0.3 Added Description, Authors, and several variables added in several Entities. 
0.0.4 Added logic 'women_id > studio_id > serie_id' to 'diagnosis_image_ent'. Deleted variables with laterality notion as it is included in the 'serie_id'. Updated NUTS catalogue to delete spaces within variable labels. Corrected variables {'image_type_cd', 'ct_cd', 'cn_cd'} to format 'Integer', as indicated by their catalogue (i.e., data dictionary). 
0.0.5 Updated 'diagnosis_image_ent' to 'dcm_studies_metadata'. Added 'manufacturer_id' to 'dcm_studies_metadata'. 
0.0.6 changed 'diagnosis_image_ent' to 'dicom_series_ent'
0.0.7 Corrections in model from feedback. 
   Updated cohort definition
   Fixed some mispelled variable names
   Added DBT and CEM image type to catalog
   manufacturer_id as coded field based on catalog
   lesion_laterality --> image_laterality
   n_examinations_nm --> n_lesion_nm
   added personal_cancer_history_cd
   added image / contact reason (image_reason_cd)

cohort.name: breast_cancer_screening
cohort.description: Women undergoing population breast cancer screening with at least two screening sessions with their corresponding mammograms or other type of breast image. Women attending every two (commonly) years the corresponding Screening Prevention Program Units of their region or country; excluding women with metal implants.
cohort.inclusion_criteria: Women undergoing population breast cancer screening with at least two screening sessions with their corresponding mammograms or other type of breast image.

variables.label: woman_id
variables.description: Pseudoidentifier of each women screened
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encryption to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources
variables.possible_data_source: Health insurance database or Health care users' database

variables.label: birth_date_dt
variables.description: Woman's date of birth (month-year)
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: menarque_age_nm
variables.description: Age in years when the woman had her first menstruation

variables.label: n_full_term_pregnancies_nm
variables.description: Number of full term pregnancies

variables.label: age_first_fullterm_pregnancy_nm
variables.description: Age the women completed a full term pregnancy
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: breastfeeding_bl
variables.description: In women having full term pregnancies, this variable records if she was breastfeeding at any point

variables.label: breastfeeding_nm
variables.description: In women having full term pregnancies, this variable records how many months she was breastfeeding

variables.label: menopause_cd
variables.description: Records menopause status, as cessation of menstruation
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = unknown, '1' = premenopausic, '2' = perimenopausic, '3' = postmenopausic}
variables.observations_comments: 'premenopausic' (before any menopausal symptoms), 'perimenopausic' (transition phase with symptomps), 'postmenopause' (after 12 consecutive months without a period). The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: menopause_age_nm
variables.description: Age at which the woman reach postmenopause (after 12 consecutive months without a period)

variables.label: menopause_cause_cd
variables.description: Causes include natural, early/premature (before age 45), and induced (due to surgery or other)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = no menopause, '1' = natural, '2' = early premature, '3' = induced}
variables.observations_comments: 'NA' corresponds to not having menopause, 'early premature' (before age 45), 'induced' (due to surgery or other medical interventions such as hysterectomy or hormonal therapy. The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: personal_cancer_history_cd
variables.description: Previous tumours diagnosed
variables.transformations_from_origin:
{0=none,
1=breast,
2=ovarian,
3=pancreatic,
4=uterine,
9=others}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: breast_cancer_familial_atc_cd
variables.description: Family history of breast cancer, specially in first degree relative like a mother,sister or daugther
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = first degree, '2' = first degree under 50yo, '3' = second degree}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: ovarian_cancer_familial_atc_cd
variables.description: Family history of ovarian cancer, specially among first degree relatives
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = first degree, '2' = first degree under 50yo, '3' = second degree}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: surgical_atc_left_breast_cd
variables.description: Personal history of surgical interventions in the breast
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = unknown, '1' = none, '2' = breast reduction, '3' = breast augmentation, '4' = exeresis, '5' = benign nodule exeresis}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: surgical_atc_right_breast_cd
variables.description: Personal history of surgical interventions in the breast
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = unknown, '1' = none, '2' = breast reduction, '3' = breast augmentation, '4' = exeresis, '5' = benign nodule exeresis}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: hormonal_contraception_use_bl
variables.description: Use of hormonal contraception
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: hormonal_contraception_duration_nm
variables.description: Duration of the hormonal contraception therapy (in number of months)
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: hormonal_replacement_therapy_bl
variables.description: Use of any hormonal replacement therapy during post-menopause
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: hormonal_replacement_therapy_duration_nm
variables.description: Duration of the hormonal replacement therapy (in number of months)
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: histerectomy_bl
variables.description: Whether surgical the removal or the uterus (womb) has been performed
variables.possible_data_source: Electronic health records (EHR) or Minimum basic hospital discharge dataset

variables.label: height_nm
variables.description: Woman's height in centimetres

variables.label: weight_nm
variables.description: Woman's weight in kilograms

variables.label: comorbidity_cardiovascular_disease_bl
variables.description: Woman's comorbidities: Cardiovascular disease

variables.label: comorbidity_hypertension_bl
variables.description: Woman's comorbidities: Hypertension

variables.label: comorbidity_diabetes_bl
variables.description: Woman's comorbidities: Diabetes

variables.label: comorbidity_obesity_bl
variables.description: Woman's comorbidities: Obesity

variables.label: smoking_status_cd
variables.description: Clinical classification of a woman's tobacco use. Typically categorized as never smoker, former (ex-) smoker, or current smoker (daily or occasional)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = never smoked, '1' = former (ex-) smoker, '2' = current smoker (daily or occasional)}

variables.label: age_started_smoking_nm
variables.description: If the woman has smoking_status_cd different than '0', then the age at which the smoking habit started
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: left_breast_pathology_atc_bl
variables.description: Whether there is a personal history of surgical interventions in the LEFT breast

variables.label: right_breast_pathology_atc_bl
variables.description: Whether there is a personal history of surgical interventions in the RIGHT breast

variables.label: left_mammary_prosthesis_bl
variables.description: Whether the woman has a personal history of surgical intervention in the LEFT breast to implant a mammary prosthesis

variables.label: right_mammary_prosthesis_bl
variables.description: Whether the woman has a personal history of surgical intervention in the RIGHT breast to implant a mammary prosthesis

variables.label: residence_local_administrative_unit_cd
variables.description: Local administrative unit of residence of the woman
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database
variables.observations_comments: EU LAU codes or Local Administrative Units codes are roughly equivalent to municipalities.

variables.label: genetic_testing_brca1_cd
variables.description: Genetic testing: BRCA1
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = negative, '2' = positive}

variables.label: genetic_testing_brca2_cd
variables.description: Genetic testing: BRCA2
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = negative, '2' = positive}

variables.label: genetic_testing_palb2_cd
variables.description: Genetic testing: PALB2
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = negative, '2' = positive}

variables.label: genetic_testing_check2_cd
variables.description: Genetic testing: CHECK2
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = negative, '2' = positive}

variables.label: exitus_dt
variables.description: Date of the death of the woman
variables.possible_data_source: Insurers database or health care users' database

variables.label: woman_id
variables.description: PseudoIdentifier of the woman undergoing breast cancer screening
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encription to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources
variables.possible_data_source: Health insurance database or Health care users' database

variables.label: study_id
variables.description: PseudoIdentifier of the diagnosis image studio
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encription to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources

variables.label: series_id
variables.description: PseudoIdentifier of the image series
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encription to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources

variables.label: image_test_dt
variables.description: Date when the radiological image was taken

variables.label: image_laterality_cd
variables.description: Laterality of the image. To which breast corresponds the image
variables.transformations_from_origin: {1 = left, 2 = right, 3 = don't apply}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: image_type_cd
variables.description: Common types of diagnostic image test including mammograms (standard and 3D), breast ultrasound, MRI
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'1' = mamogram (MMG), '2' = magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), '3' = ultrasounds (ECO), '4' = breast tomosynthesis (DBT), '5' = contrast enhanced mammography (CEM), '6' = diagnosis/staging images (DSB)}
variables.observations_comments: Mamograms can be standard or 3D. DSB can correspond to any other imaging technice like CT scans, bone scans, and PET scans used for diagnosis or staging in breast cancer. The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: image_reason_cd
variables.description: Reason for contact

variables.label: healthcare_centre_cd
variables.description: Healthcare centre where the image was taken
variables.observations_comments: Best if it complies with national or regional healthcare centre catalogues

variables.label: manufacturer_id
variables.description: Coded name of the diagnosis imaging device manufacturer
variables.transformations_from_origin:
{SIEMENS=Siemens,
GE = General Electric,
FUJI = Fujifilm,
AGFA = AGFA,
PHILLIPS = Phillips,
UNK = unknown}

variables.label: breast_density_cd
variables.description: Breast density as assessed using the image test
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = unknown, '1' = ACRa, '2' = ACRb, '3' = ACRc, '4' = ACRd}
variables.observations_comments: Categories correspond to: A (almost entirely fatty), B (scattered areas of fibroglandular density), C (heterogenous dense), and D (extremely dense). A and B are considered fatty; while C and D are considered dense. The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: birads_cd
variables.description: Breast Imaging Reporting and Data System (BIRADS) classification by American College of Radiology
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: benign_lesion_cd
variables.description: Presence of benign breast lesions and non-cancerous grows (i.e., fibrocistic changes, fibroadenomas)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = fibrocystis, '2' = fibroadenomas, '3' = cysts, '4' = microcalcifications}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: malignant_lesion_cd
variables.description: Presence of malignant lesions
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = unifocal, '2' = multifocal, '3' = multicentric}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: lesion_location_cd
variables.description: Locator of the lesion following a four-quadrant system or a clock-face method
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = none, '1' = Upper Outer Quadrant (UOQ), '2' = Upper Inner Quadrant (UIQ), '3' = Lower Outer Quadrant (LOQ), '4' = Lower Inner Quadrant (LIQ), '5' = Axillary tail of breast, '6' = Nipple area complex, '7' = Central portion of breast}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: lesion_size_nm
variables.description: Size of the larger diameter of the lesion detected in centimetres

variables.label: lesion_mass_shape_cd
variables.description: Suspicious features of the detected lesion
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'NA', '0' = unknown, '1' = none, '2' = oval, '3' = round, '4' = irregular}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: lesion_mass_margin_cd
variables.description: Edge where the detected lesion meets the surrounding tissue
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'NA', '0' = unknown, '1' = none, '2' = circumscribed, '3' = angular, '4' = microlobulated, '5' = indistinct, '6' = spiculated}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: lesion_associated_features_cd
variables.description: Presence of other relevant features in the detected lesion
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'NA','0' = none, '1' = skin thickness, '2' = skin retraction, '3' = retraction of the nipple, '4' = architectural distortion, '5' = duct changes, '6' = edema, '7' = absent vascularity, '8' = internal vascularity, '9' = vessels in rim(adjecent sign)}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: ct_cd
variables.description: Describes the size of the primary tumor and its extent of invasion into surrounding tissues (cT) assessed during surgery

variables.label: cn_cd
variables.description: Describes the N category of the TNM system describing how cancer has spread to nearby lymph nodes (cN) assessed during surgery

variables.label: n_lesions_nm
variables.description: Number of lesions found. 0 if there is not found lesion in the image

variables.label: exploration_result_cd
variables.description: Result of exploration of the explored breast
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = negative, '1' = suspect, '2' = positive}

variables.label: exploration_description_st
variables.description: Narrative description of the exploration results for the breast

variables.label: woman_id
variables.description: PseudoIdentifier
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encription to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources
variables.possible_data_source: Health insurance database or Health care users' database

variables.label: initial_treatment_cd
variables.description: First treatment (or planned treatment) the patient underwent
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = none, '2' = neoadyuvancy, '3' = surgery}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: initial_treatment_code_st
variables.description: CIE-10-CM code of the initial treatment
variables.observations_comments: CIE-10-CM

variables.label: initial_treatment_date_dt
variables.description: Date of the initial treatment
variables.observations_comments: CIE-10-CM

variables.label: surgical_intervention_type_cd
variables.description: Main type of breast cancer surgery as initial treatment
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = breast conserving surgery, '2' = mastectomy, '3' = double mastectomy}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: adyuvant_treatment_cd
variables.description: Treatment (or planned treatment) after main treatment
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = none, '2' = radiotherapy, '3' = hormonal therapy, '4' = chemotherapy}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: lymphovascular_invasion_bl
variables.description: Describe whether lymphovascular invasion is absent or present in the patient
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis

variables.label: number_lymph_nodes_examined_nm
variables.description: Number of lymph nodes examined during the surgical procedure

variables.label: number_lymph_nodes_positive_nm
variables.description: Number of lymph nodes positive (i.e., invaded)

variables.label: woman_id
variables.description: PseudoIdentifier
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encription to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources
variables.possible_data_source: Health insurance database or Health care users' database

variables.label: biopsy_dt
variables.description: Date when the biopsy of the suspect tissue was done

variables.label: procedure_type_cd
variables.description: Type of biopsy procedure done to collect a tissue sample (specimen) for examintation
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = unknown, '2' = none, '3' = core biopsy, '4' = vacum-assisted core biopsy (VAB)}
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: tumor_histotype_cd
variables.description: Specific type of cancer. Classification describing cancer's origin and histologic features
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = lobular carcinoma in situ, '2' = ductal carcinoma in situ, '3' = solid-type infiltrating duct carcinoma, '4' = infiltrating lobular carcinoma, '5' = other histotypes}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: estrogen_receptors_perc_nm
variables.description: Percentage of cancer cells in the specimen that have receptors for the estrogen hormone
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis

variables.label: progesterone_receptors_perc_nm
variables.description: Percentage of cancer cells in the specimen that have receptors for the progesterone hormone
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis

variables.label: her2_ihc_status_bl
variables.description: Presence of human epidermal growth factor 2 (Caution: Check logic)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = negative (IHC value 0 or 1), '1' = positive (IHC value 3+ or verified by FISH if IHC 2+)}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis
variables.observations_comments: Please, check conditional logic while transforming the value of the results into 0 = negative / 1 = positive, boolean values

variables.label: her2_fish_positive_bl
variables.description: Presence of human epidermal growth factor 2 (FISH test)
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis

variables.label: ki67_perc_nm
variables.description: Percentage of expression of the Ki-67 protein, indicating how fast cancer cells are dividing
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis

variables.label: intrinsic_subtype_cd
variables.description: Biologically distinct types of breast cancer classified based on their gene expression patterns
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = unknown, '2' = luminal A, '3' = luminal B, '4' = HER2-pure, '5' = HER2-enriched, '6' = triple negative}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: breast_cancer_molecular_subtype_cd
variables.description: Cancer type additional information: Breast cancer molecular subtype (PAM50)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = Luminal A, '1' = Luminal B - HER2 negative, '2' = Luminal B - HER2 positive/HR positive, '3' = HER2 positive (enriched)/HR negative (non-luminal)}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomophatology report or anatomopathology image analysis

variables.label: tumor_grade_cd
variables.description: Breast cancer grade describes how abnormal cancer cells look compared to normal cells
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = unknown,  '2' = low grade, '3' = intermediate grade, '4' = high grade}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: tumor_stage_cd
variables.description: Breast cancer staging describing the size of the tumor and the extent of its spread.
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: tumor_type_cd
variables.description: Breast cancer type categorized by their location and whether they are invasive or non-invasive
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA,'1' = unknown, '2' = Ductal infiltrating (IDC),  '3' = Lobular infiltrating (ILC), '4' = dutal in situ (Dcis), '5' = lobular in situ (Lcis)}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: tumor_initial_t_stage_cd
variables.description: Describes the size of the primary tumor and its extent of invasion into surrounding tissues (pT)
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: tumor_initial_n_stage_cd
variables.description: Describes the N category of the TNM system describing how cancer has spread to nearby lymph nodes (pN)
variables.possible_data_source: Tumor extension study, diagnostic imaging, anatomopathology report
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: staging_cmetastasis_cd
variables.description: Indicates if the cancer has spread to distant parts of the body (by image)
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: woman_id
variables.description: PseudoIdentifier
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encription to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources
variables.possible_data_source: Health insurance database or Health care users' database

variables.label: neoadjuvant_therapy_drug_atc_cd
variables.description: ATC code of the drug used for neoadjuvant therapy

variables.label: neoadjuvant_therapy_drug_rxnorm_cd
variables.description: RxNorm code of the drug used for neoadjuvant therapy

variables.label: neoadjuvant_therapy_duration_nm
variables.description: Duration of the neoadjuvant therapy pharmacological (drug) treatment in months

variables.label: drug_dosage_nm
variables.description: Neoadjuvant therapy drug dosage in miligrams

variables.label: cumulative_drug_dosage_nm
variables.description: Neoadjuvant therapy drug cumulative dosage

variables.label: woman_id
variables.description: PseudoIdentifier
variables.transformations_from_origin: Apply encription to generate a consistent pseudonym across linked data sources
variables.possible_data_source: Health insurance database or Health care users' database

variables.label: neoadjuvant_therapy_response_mp_cd
variables.description: Neoadjuvant therapy evaluates how much the tumor was affected by chemo (Miller-Payne -MP grading)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = unknown, '2' = Grade 1, '3' = Grade 2, '4' = Grade 3, '5' = Grade 4, '6' = Grade 5 (pCR)}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: neoadjuvant_therapy_response_rcb_cd
variables.description: Neoadjuvant therapy evaluates how much the tumor was affected by chemo (Residual Cancer Burden)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = unknown, '2' = RCB-0, '3' = RCB-I, '4' = RCB-II, '5' = RCB-III}
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis, diagnosis imaging
variables.observations_comments: Residual Cancer Burden (RCB) is scoreing system used after neoadjuvant therapy to measure the amount of invasive breast cancer remaining in the breast and lymph nodes. The results are categorised in to four groups: RCB-0 (no residual cancer), RCB-I (minimal residual cancer), RCB-II (moderate residual cancer), RCB-III (extensive residual cancer). The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: ypt_cd
variables.description: Size of the tumor after neoadjuvancy treatment
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis, diagnosis imaging
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: ypn_cd
variables.description: Node lymph involvement after neoadjuvancy treatment
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis, diagnosis imaging
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: ypm_cd
variables.description: Metastasis presence after neoadjuvancy treatment
variables.possible_data_source: Biopsy specimen anatomopathology report; anatomopathology image analysis, diagnosis imaging
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: recurrence_date_dt
variables.description: Date when the recurrence was detected (alias date of relapse)

variables.label: recurrence_bl
variables.description: Whether the lesion has recurred or relapsed
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = FALSE, '1' = TRUE}
variables.possible_data_source: Minimum basic hospital discharge dataset,Tumor extension study, diagnostic imaging

variables.label: recurrence_site_cd
variables.description: Breast cancer recurrence location (i.e., relapse type)
variables.transformations_from_origin: {'0' = NA, '1' = none, '2' = locally (same breast), '3' = ipsilateral (other breast), '4' = regionally (nearby lymph nodes), '5' = distantly (lungs, bones, brain)}
variables.possible_data_source: Minimum basic hospital discharge dataset, Tumor extension study, diagnostic imaging
variables.observations_comments: The values of the variable must match the 'code' column in the catalog.

variables.label: last_followup_contact_dt
variables.description: Last date of follow up contact in the clinical history of the patient
